titlestmt.author: Compiled by M. Warren, B. Huth

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2023-01-31 23:07:18 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.physdesc: Reports, notes, journals, photograph album, mimeographed material, correspondence, memoranda, minutes, office calendars, desk and field notes, travel accounts, diaries, logs of trips, and other papers.
did.abstract: Reports; mimeographed and printed material from Agricultural Economics Extension files on subjects such as cooperatives, farm management, and marketing; articles and speeches on extension work; notes, journals, photograph album, mimeographed material, correspondence, memoranda, and minutes of various conferences, workshops, and committees; reports of the Los Baños Project in the Philippines (1963); office calendars, desk and field notes, travel accounts, and diaries; logs of trips to Germany, England, and Mexico; papers relating to Epsilon Sigma Phi, an honorary extension fraternity; and correspondence, notes, and other records pertaining to local organizations including the Ithaca Cooperative Consumers' Society Inc. and First Congregational Church of Ithaca (New York).

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
bioghist.p: Maurice C. Bond (Cornell University Ph.D. 1928) taught marketing and was Director of Extension, Cornell University.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Reports; mimeographed and printed material from Agricultural Economics Extension files on subjects such as cooperatives, farm management, and marketing; articles and speeches on extension work; notes, journals, photograph album, mimeographed material, correspondence, memoranda, and minutes of various conferences, workshops, and committees; reports of the Los Baños Project in the Philippines (1963); color slides of the Cornell-University of the Philippines ICA project (1956-67); office calendars, desk and field notes, travel accounts, and diaries; logs of trips to Germany, England, and Mexico; papers relating to Epsilon Sigma Phi, an honorary extension fraternity; and correspondence, notes, and other records pertaining to local organizations including the Ithaca Cooperative Consumers' Society Inc. and First Congregational Church of Ithaca (New York).

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Maurice Chester Bond papers, #21-24-248. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

did.unittitle: Central New York Regional Marketing Authority - manager's (Don D. Ward) report
Ithaca Cooperative Consumers' Society, Inc., Director's Handbook
Co-op Food Store - minutes of meeting
Report of the Visiting Professor and Extension Consultant, U.P.-Cornell Graduate Education Program
New York State College of Agriculture - history
Agricultural Economics Extension - Plan of Work
Agricultural Economics Extension - Plan of Work
ECOP - Extension Committee on Organizations & Policy
Economic aspects of advertising and promotion
Marketing Sub-committee of ECOP, Wash., D.C.
Marketing Sub-committee of ECOP - Task Force
National Subcommittee on Marketing, ECOP, Montana
Food Marketing Extension - Upstate Training Schools
Series II. Church and civic organizations
Trustees minutes (not originals); letter by Rev. George and four quick meetings of trustees
New church - Finance Committee - minutes and plans
Building fund brochure, canvass and publicity
New church - Finance Committee - correspondence and conference notes
Series III. Articles, conference notes, talks
Correspondence, et al. concerning the first trip and review of Cornell contract with University of Philippines College of Agriculture
Terminal reports - College of Agriculture, University of the Philippines
Report - University of the Philippines College of Agriculture alumni opinion survey
Inauguration of Dr. Carlos P. Romolo (University of the Philippines)
Inauguration of Pilar Hidalgo Lim (Centro Escolar U.)
Letter from Major Max Myers, Philippines
Fertilizer - Its Importance in the Development of Philippine Agriculture
FHD and Extension, University of the Philippines College of Agriculture (UPCA)
FHD and Extension, University of the Philippines College of Agriculture (UPCA)
Puerto Rico (summary in facts and figures)
UPCA report on the visiting professor and extension consultant
Correspondence, University of the Philippines - Visiting Professor Bond
Peterson-Bond letters, etc. re: Philippine project - Extension and graduate education
Barnett, Dr. Milton E. - Council on Economic and Cultural Affairs - Philippines
University of the Philippines, Cornell Graduate Education and Training
C.E.C.A. with on Economics and Cultural Affairs
Case studies of farm families, Laguna Province
Two publications re: agriculture in Los Banos
The Bulletin, Christian Inst. for Ethnic Studies in Asia
Bond Report - University of the Philippines, College of Agriculture (UPCA)
UPCA faculty talks on teaching review
Sta. Maria-Mabitac First Report Field Study
150th anniversary of the birth of Ezra Cornell
Six 12" 78 rpm phonograph records: WGY Farm Forum, Aug. 26, 1955, Dec. 13, 1957, M.C. Bond talking on Separation of Extension and Farm Bureau in New York State
